name: freelance-marketplace-saas
description: Monorepo for a category-agnostic, geo-aware freelance marketplace SaaS platform

scripts.vercel:build: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@acme/web && rm -rf web/.next web/node_modules/next && mkdir -p web/node_modules && cp -R apps/web/.next web/.next && NEXT_DIR=$(node -p "require('path').dirname(require.resolve('next/package.json'))") && cp -RL "$NEXT_DIR" web/node_modules/next
